description: Bottom of a petition. In Arabic script. Dating: Perhaps Ayyubid-era, based on the titles. The addressee (the caliph or vizier?) is asked to issue (or have issued) "the noble rescript" (al-tawqīʿ al-karīm) to al-Qāḍī al-Muwaffaq al-Sadīd Sayf al-Dīn(?) with an order for clarification of the petitioner's issue (bi-istīḍāḥ ḥālihī). Might mention "the doctors" (الطب). Reused for Hebrew jottings. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
